set.body: Migrated the active Beads issue set into the repo-local .mote store. Imported 43 active issues from .beads/issues.jsonl, preserved active dependency edges, then added five Phase 5 fresh-eyes follow-up motes directly in mote. Beads is no longer the active tracker for this repo; .beads remains archival only.
set.title: Migrate active Beads issues to mote
